vita: Born on the bustling spaceport city of Talos Prime, I was raised amongst a race known for their diplomatic prowess and trade skills. As an adult, my life revolves around fostering peaceful relations between different galactic factions while ensuring our colony's prosperity through fair commerce.
portrait_prompt: Photorealistic portrait of a Vor'Tak colonist with sleek silver-blue skin and shimmering, translucent iridescent scales. The character wears traditional attire that reflects their mixed heritage - half human upper body in elegant garments interwoven with organic fibers from our home planet and the other half resembling durable synthetic materials common to space-faring civilizations.
